references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung, and top alternatives tested
Best smart ring 2026: From Oura and Samsung to other discreet fitness trackers
I've tested the best smart rings for tracking your health
Ultrahuman Ring PRO — category-defining 15-day battery and Jade AI
RingConn Gen 2 smart ring review: the best cheap smart ring gets an upgrade
Circular Ring 2 Review: A Smart Ring That Challenges the Giants

en.commentary:
The 2026 smart ring market comes down to one question: are you willing to pay a monthly subscription to access the health data you already paid for with your hardware purchase? I've tracked this market closely, and my verdict is that Oura Ring 4 earns its number-one ranking through genuine technical superiority in sleep staging. Its multi-wavelength PPG sensor architecture and refined algorithm have been validated by peer-reviewed sleep research to achieve "good agreement" with polysomnography — the clinical gold standard. That kind of independent scientific validation is not something competitors have matched yet, and it matters if you're buying a ring specifically to optimize sleep quality.

That said, the subscription model creates real friction. Oura's $5.99 monthly fee adds $72 per year in perpetuity, meaning a three-year owner pays over $560 total versus $349 for the hardware alone. That math is exactly why Samsung Galaxy Ring and RingConn Gen 2 have claimed the second and third positions in my rankings. Samsung's Galaxy AI engine, which combines ring sensor data with Galaxy smartphone usage patterns to produce a richer Energy Score, is a meaningful differentiator. RingConn Gen 2's 12-day battery life is an industry-leading achievement — and it includes sleep apnea monitoring at zero additional cost, a clinical feature that Oura charges for through its subscription tier.

Ultrahuman's Ring Pro, shipping May 2026 at $479, represents the technology frontier in the subscription-free camp: 15-day battery, a dual-core processor, and the Jade AI biointelligence engine that synthesizes sleep, recovery, circadian rhythm, and stress data into unified recommendations. It ranks fourth because it hasn't shipped at scale yet. The Ring Air holds fifth, with a strong sensor suite but only 4–6 day battery life — a noticeable step down from Samsung and RingConn at similar pricing.

Circular Ring 2 earns its sixth-place ranking through a capability no other ring in this list offers: FDA-cleared atrial fibrillation detection via ECG. At $379 with no subscription, it occupies a specific and defensible position for users who want cardiovascular monitoring beyond what fitness-grade wearables provide. Amazfit Helio Ring ranks seventh as the clear budget entry: $199, no subscription, and 1.4-hour charging that is genuinely the fastest in the category. Evie Ring closes the list at eighth — not because it underperforms, but because its design scope is deliberately narrow. It is the only ring built around women's physiology, with EDA-based emotional pattern recognition and a proprietary menstrual cycle integration that generalist rings approximate but don't match.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 holds the top rank because sleep research backs it up
highlights.body: The Oura Ring 4's multi-wavelength PPG sensor array and validated sleep-staging algorithm represent the most scientifically grounded approach to health tracking in the consumer wearable market. Independent research published in peer-reviewed journals found that Oura's sleep stage classification achieves good agreement with polysomnography on global sleep measures, including deep sleep. No competing ring in this tier has published equivalent third-party validation. The $349 hardware plus $5.99 monthly subscription is the premium you pay for that accuracy, and for users who rely on sleep quality data to make real behavioral decisions, it remains the correct purchase.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 wins the total-cost calculation over three years
highlights.body: At $299 with zero subscription fees and 12-day battery life, the RingConn Gen 2 offers a genuinely compelling value proposition that compounds over time. Over a 36-month ownership period, a Gen 2 owner pays $299 total versus approximately $563 for an Oura Ring 4 user at the $5.99 monthly rate. The inclusion of sleep apnea monitoring — a feature that requires a premium Oura plan — adds real clinical weight to that comparison. The 12-day battery removes one of the most common friction points of wearable ownership: the need to charge your ring before a weekend trip or a work week away from your desk.

highlights.title: Circular Ring 2 is the only option with FDA-cleared AFib detection
highlights.body: Atrial fibrillation is one of the most underdiagnosed cardiovascular conditions, affecting millions of people who experience no obvious symptoms. The Circular Ring 2's FDA-cleared ECG-based AFib detection is a capability that the Oura Ring 4, Samsung Galaxy Ring, and RingConn Gen 2 do not currently offer in their hardware. Tracking over 140 biometric markers at $379 with no ongoing subscription positions it as the most medically oriented ring in the category, which is a legitimate differentiator for users with family history of cardiac events or for those who simply want a ring that functions closer to a continuous health monitoring device.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring is the right call for Galaxy phone owners
highlights.body: The Galaxy Ring's integration with Samsung Health and Galaxy AI creates a health picture that goes beyond what the ring hardware alone can measure. By combining ring-based biometrics with smartphone usage patterns, step data from other Galaxy devices, and sleep context, the Energy Score becomes a more accurate measure of daily readiness than any isolated sensor stream. The ring carries a $299.99 price tag with no subscription, and in Taiwan it comes with official Samsung retail support and warranty coverage at NT$12,990 — removing the risk and uncertainty that comes with grey-market imports for competing products.

highlights.title: The subscription-free vs. subscription divide is the 2026 market's defining trade-off
highlights.body: Six of the eight rings in this ranking charge nothing beyond the initial hardware purchase. Oura is the exception, and it justifies that model with the strongest sleep validation data in the category. The practical question every buyer needs to answer before purchasing is whether they value validated sleep data enough to pay for it indefinitely, or whether the combination of solid hardware, no ongoing fees, and specific differentiators — battery life, AFib detection, women's health focus — makes a subscription-free alternative the better fit. There is no universally correct answer, but the subscription decision is more consequential than any individual feature comparison.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的智慧戒指市場，核心爭議其實只有一個：你願意每個月持續為自己的健康數據付費嗎？

我研究這個市場很久了，結論是 Oura Ring 4 排第一有它的道理。多波長 PPG 感測器加上精調的睡眠分期演算法，有同儕審查的學術研究拿 polysomnography 做交叉驗證，確認 Oura 的睡眠追蹤準確率達到「良好一致性」。這個等級的獨立科學驗證，是目前其他競品還沒有辦法提供的。但月費 $5.99、一年 $72，三年下來你在訂閱費上多花了超過 NT$7,000，這筆帳值不值得視用途而定。

Samsung Galaxy Ring 和 RingConn Gen 2 在我的排名裡緊接著第二和第三，理由很直接。Galaxy AI 把戒指感測數據和 Galaxy 手機的使用脈絡放在一起計算 Energy Score，整合深度是其他零月費選項給不到的，加上台灣有官方通路，NT$12,990 買到的是有保障的消費體驗。RingConn Gen 2 走的是另一條路，12 天電池在整個市場找不到競爭對手，睡眠呼吸中止偵測功能包在零月費裡，三年總持有成本比 Oura Ring 4 低超過 NT$7,000。

Ultrahuman Ring Pro 是 2026 年技術規格最強的零月費戒指，15 天電池加 Jade AI 引擎，但 2026 年 5 月才開始出貨，排第四是因為大規模量產紀錄還不夠。Circular Ring 2 的 FDA 認證 AFib 偵測功能在整個智慧戒指市場目前沒有對手，$379 零月費換到這個功能集合，對有心血管健康顧慮的用戶是很實在的選擇。Amazfit Helio Ring 是新手入門的首選，NT$6,490 不需月費，睡眠準確度超出這個價位的預期，1.4 小時快充是全市場最快。Evie Ring 是唯一專為女性生理週期設計的戒指，EDA 感測器加月經週期整合給出的情緒追蹤深度，泛用型戒指只能做到近似而已。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 排第一，因為有學術研究撐腰
highlights.body: Oura Ring 4 的睡眠分期準確率是目前智慧戒指市場唯一有同儕審查研究以臨床 polysomnography 做交叉驗證的選擇，在全局睡眠指標和深度睡眠分期上達到「良好一致性」的結論。這個層次的獨立驗證在競品裡暫時找不到對標。月費 $5.99 是你為這個準確率支付的成本，對需要可靠睡眠數據來做行為調整的用戶，這筆訂閱費用我覺得說得通。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 的三年總持有成本最低，帳算起來差距很大
highlights.body: RingConn Gen 2 定價 $299 加零月費，三年下來的總花費是 NT$9,490（台灣 PChome 售價），相比之下 Oura Ring 4 三年的總花費是約 NT$13,500 硬體加上 NT$7,128 訂閱費，差距超過 NT$11,000。12 天電池解決了智慧戒指最常被抱怨的痛點，睡眠呼吸中止偵測功能更是這個價位帶罕見的功能配置，整體性價比在市場上找不到對手。

highlights.title: Circular Ring 2 是目前唯一有 AFib 偵測的智慧戒指
highlights.body: 心房顫動是最常被漏診的心血管疾病之一，很多患者完全沒有明顯症狀。Circular Ring 2 的 FDA 認證 ECG 加 AFib 偵測，是 Oura Ring 4、Samsung Galaxy Ring 和 RingConn Gen 2 的硬體目前都沒有提供的功能。追蹤超過 140 項生物指標加零月費，$379 的售價對有家族心血管病史或想要接近連續健康監測的用戶是一個明確的差異化選擇。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 是 Galaxy 用戶的最強理由
highlights.body: Galaxy AI 把戒指感測器數據、Galaxy 手機使用紀錄和其他 Galaxy 裝置的活動數據整合計算，Energy Score 的脈絡感和準確度比純靠戒指感測器計算的方案高一個層次。台灣 NT$12,990 有官方三星門市和 momo 購物網路購，保固和維修不用走代購管道，是幾個主要競品裡台灣消費者購買風險最低的選擇。

highlights.title: 選購前先確定自己對月費訂閱的態度，比較其他規格才有意義
highlights.body: 這份排行榜裡八款戒指有六款是零月費，Oura 是唯一的例外，靠最強的睡眠追蹤準確率撐起這個定價模式。選購前最該確定的問題只有一個：你有多需要那個睡眠準確率的差距？如果答案是「很需要」，Oura 值得考慮；如果答案是「說不定差不多就好」，零月費陣營裡的 RingConn Gen 2、Samsung Galaxy Ring 或 Circular Ring 2 每一個都能在特定需求上做到比 Oura 更好的選擇。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung, and top alternatives tested
Best smart ring 2026: From Oura and Samsung to other discreet fitness trackers
Oura Ring 4 March 2026 update: new AI model trained on women's health clinical research
Ultrahuman Ring PRO officially announced at $479 — category-leading 15-day battery

en.commentary:
A notable development this week: Oura rolled out a software update in March 2026 that includes a specific AI model trained on clinical research in women's health. The update adds period cycle analysis that factors in luteal phase temperature patterns and integrates with Oura's Readiness Score to provide menstrual-aware activity and recovery recommendations. This is a direct competitive response to the Evie Ring's hardware-level focus on female physiology, and it meaningfully expands Oura Ring 4's utility for roughly half its user base.

The rankings remain stable this week. Oura holds first through validated sleep science and now a broadened women's health software layer. Samsung Galaxy Ring holds second as the no-subscription choice for Galaxy ecosystem users, where Galaxy AI's cross-device data integration remains a genuine differentiator. RingConn Gen 2 at third continues to offer the most compelling total cost of ownership argument in the category — 12-day battery, sleep apnea monitoring, and zero subscription fees at $299.

Ultrahuman Ring Pro remains at fourth — officially announced at $479 with 15-day battery life and the Jade AI biointelligence engine — but still awaiting mass market availability as of April 2026. The May 2026 shipping timeline is confirmed, which means the Pro's ranking position reflects pre-release status rather than a fundamental judgment of its capability. Based on announced specifications, it represents the most technically ambitious subscription-free ring ever built, and its ranking may shift upward once shipment data and user reviews are available.

highlights.title: Oura's March 2026 women's health AI update strengthens the case for its number-one ranking
highlights.body: A dedicated AI model trained on peer-reviewed clinical research in women's health is a meaningful product update, not just a marketing announcement. The integration of menstrual cycle phases with Readiness Score and activity recommendations creates a feedback loop that generalist health tracking doesn't provide. For Oura's large female user base, this update addresses the most common criticism of health trackers built around male physiology research — which makes the Oura Ring 4 a substantially stronger recommendation for women in 2026 than it was in 2025.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2's three-year total cost of ownership remains the strongest value argument in the category
highlights.body: At $299 with zero subscription fees and 12-day battery life, the RingConn Gen 2 delivers a cumulative cost advantage of over $200 versus the Oura Ring 4 at the end of year one, growing to $500 or more by year three. The inclusion of sleep apnea monitoring — a clinical-grade feature that requires a premium Oura subscription tier — adds genuine health value at no extra cost. For buyers who are primarily motivated by total cost of ownership over three-plus years of use, the Gen 2 calculation is compelling.

highlights.title: Ultrahuman Ring Pro is the subscription-free ring to watch — shipping May 2026
highlights.body: The Ring Pro's combination of a 15-day battery, dual-core processor, and Jade AI biointelligence engine represents the most ambitious specification set in the subscription-free tier. The 15-day battery is a category-leading achievement that surpasses the already-strong 12-day RingConn Gen 2 by three days, and the Jade AI's synthesis of sleep, recovery, and circadian data into unified recommendations positions it as the most complete health intelligence platform in a ring form factor. The May 2026 shipping date confirmation makes this a watch-list item that could move to top-three after first-wave user reviews are published.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週有一個值得注意的發展：Oura 在三月推出了一個以女性健康臨床研究訓練的 AI 模型軟體更新。這個更新加入了考慮黃體期體溫模式的月經週期分析，並把這些數據整合到 Readiness Score 和活動恢復建議中。這是對 Evie Ring 硬體層面女性生理設計的直接競爭回應，對 Oura 用戶群裡大約一半的用戶來說是真實的功能提升。

這週排名維持穩定。Oura 靠學術驗證的睡眠追蹤加上現在更完整的女性健康軟體層繼續排第一。Samsung Galaxy Ring 作為 Galaxy 生態系用戶的零月費首選排第二，Galaxy AI 的跨裝置數據整合仍然是真正的差異化能力。RingConn Gen 2 排第三繼續提供這個類別裡最有說服力的總持有成本計算，12 天電池加睡眠呼吸中止偵測加零月費，在 NT$9,490 這個價格點上找不到競爭對手。

Ultrahuman Ring Pro 維持第四，正式宣布售價 $479、15 天電池和 Jade AI 引擎，但 2026 年 4 月仍等待大規模市售，確認 5 月出貨。等到首批用戶評測出來，排名可能往上移動。

highlights.title: Oura 三月的女性健康 AI 更新強化了第一名的依據
highlights.body: 以同儕審查臨床研究訓練的女性健康 AI 模型是真實的產品更新，不只是行銷公告。月經週期分期和 Readiness Score 與活動建議的整合，為以男性生理研究為主設計的通用健康追蹤提供了一個更精準的反饋迴路。對 Oura 龐大的女性用戶群，這個更新讓 Oura Ring 4 在 2026 年對女性用戶的推薦力度比 2025 年明顯更強。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 的三年總持有成本仍然是這個類別最有力的性價比論點
highlights.body: NT$9,490 加零月費加 12 天電池，第一年末的累積成本優勢相比 Oura Ring 4 就超過 NT$7,000，到第三年這個差距超過 NT$14,000。包含在零月費裡的睡眠呼吸中止偵測功能在 Oura 需要付費升級訂閱方案才能解鎖，這個功能差距的性價比說服力很強。對主要在意三年以上使用的總持有成本的買家，Gen 2 的帳算起來很清楚。

highlights.title: Ultrahuman Ring Pro 是零月費陣營最值得關注的新選手，5 月出貨
highlights.body: Ring Pro 的 15 天電池加雙核處理器加 Jade AI 生物智能引擎是零月費陣列裡規格最雄心勃勃的組合。15 天電池超過已經很強的 RingConn Gen 2 的 12 天三天，Jade AI 整合睡眠、恢復和晝夜節律數據到統一建議的能力讓它定位為智慧戒指形式下最完整的健康智能平台。5 月出貨確認讓這個產品在觀察名單裡，等首批用戶評測出來，前三名的位置可能會調整。

references.title: Best Smart Rings 2026: Oura Ring Health Tracker Picks
Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung, and top alternatives
Samsung Galaxy Ring vs Oura Ring 4

en.commentary: The Oura Ring 4 holds its position at the top of smart ring rankings in April 2026. Oura's decision in March 2026 to roll out an AI model trained specifically on women's health research is a meaningful product development, not just a feature announcement. The blood test integration for US users adds metabolic health tracking that no other ring can currently offer. The Samsung Galaxy Ring follows closely as the best option for Android and Samsung ecosystem users, with no subscription requirement and tight integration with Samsung Health. The RingConn Gen 2 continues to offer the best battery life in the category with a 9.5 score, and at a price lower than the flagship options with no subscription, it represents strong value for users who prioritize hardware longevity over ecosystem depth.

highlights.title: Oura's March 2026 Women's Health AI Update Is a Real Differentiator
highlights.body: Training a dedicated AI model on clinical research in women's health, combined with the rollout of blood test integration for metabolic tracking, extends Oura's lead on health depth. No competitor currently matches this level of clinical data integration. For users who want medically-informed health insights rather than general wellness scores, Oura remains the clear leader.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring Has No Subscription and Strong Ecosystem Integration
highlights.body: The absence of a monthly subscription is a real competitive advantage over Oura. The Samsung Galaxy Ring at $399 gives you everything you pay for upfront, with health tracking accuracy that independent reviews confirm is competitive with Oura for sleep and activity metrics. For Galaxy phone users, the data integration with Samsung Health creates a cohesive health dashboard.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 Offers the Best Value for Hardware-First Buyers
highlights.body: A 9.5 battery life score and 9.5 value score, with no subscription required, makes the RingConn Gen 2 the best option for users who want reliable long-term wear without ongoing costs. The battery life advantage means less frequent charging and higher wear consistency, which directly improves data quality for sleep tracking.

zh-tw.commentary: Oura Ring 4 在四月繼續守住第一，三月推出的女性健康 AI 模型是這個類別目前最具深度的健康功能更新，不是單純的行銷話術。針對女性健康臨床研究訓練的 AI，加上美國用戶開始可以整合血液檢測追蹤代謝健康，這些功能目前其他智慧戒指沒有能力複製。Samsung Galaxy Ring 以免訂閱和與 Samsung Health 的深度整合緊跟在後，399 美元（約台幣一萬三）買斷價格對比 Oura 每月訂閱費是真實的成本優勢。RingConn Gen 2 以 9.5 的電池續航和 9.5 的 CP 值分數，維持著買一次用到夠、不需要訂閱的使用者的最佳選擇地位。

highlights.title: Oura 三月的女性健康 AI 更新是真實的功能差距
highlights.body: 專門針對女性健康臨床研究訓練的 AI 模型，加上美國用戶的血液檢測代謝追蹤整合，讓 Oura 在健康數據深度上的領先進一步擴大。目前沒有競爭對手能提供同等級的臨床數據整合，對想要醫療資訊支撐的健康洞察而不只是一般健康評分的使用者，Oura 依然是明確的第一。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 的免訂閱設計是真實的競爭優勢
highlights.body: 不需要每月付費是 Galaxy Ring 相對 Oura 的核心優勢。399 美元（約台幣一萬三）買斷、睡眠和活動追蹤精度達到競技水準、加上 Samsung Health 的深度整合，對 Galaxy 手機使用者來說，這個組合很難被說服放棄。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 是硬體優先使用者的最佳選擇
highlights.body: 9.5 的電池續航加上 9.5 的 CP 值，而且不需要訂閱，讓 RingConn Gen 2 成為想要長期穩定配戴又不想持續付費的使用者的正確選擇。電池續航優勢意味著充電頻率更低、配戴一致性更高，這直接提升睡眠追蹤的數據品質。

references.title: 10 Best Smart Rings for Health Tracking (April 2026)
Best smart ring 2026: From Oura and Samsung
Best Smart Ring Health Tracker Picks for 2026

en.commentary:
The smart ring market is maturing in a way that clarifies rather than complicates the buying decision. The fundamental split is this: Oura Ring 4 leads on validated sleep science, and no competitor has published peer-reviewed research to challenge that position. The 94% polysomnography agreement figure represents a clinical benchmark that Oura has consistently backed with published studies. If accurate, research-validated sleep staging is what you're buying a ring for, Oura is the correct purchase, and the $5.99 monthly subscription is the price of that accuracy.

Everything else on this list makes a different value proposition. Samsung Galaxy Ring at second place benefits from the most sophisticated ecosystem integration available in a zero-subscription ring. The Energy Score, which synthesizes biometric data from the ring with contextual data from Samsung Health and Galaxy smartphones, produces a daily readiness metric that is more contextually aware than what a ring can generate from its sensors alone. For Galaxy ecosystem users, this is a genuine differentiator that justifies the $299.99 hardware price with no ongoing fee.

RingConn Gen 2 at third is where I point buyers who want the best three-year total cost of ownership. At $299 with zero subscription, the 12-day battery life removes charging friction as a wearable behavior issue, and the inclusion of sleep apnea monitoring at no extra cost adds a clinical-grade screening tool that Oura charges for through its higher subscription tier. Over 36 months, the Gen 2 saves you over $215 compared to the Oura Ring 4 at the base subscription rate, and that gap widens to over $350 at Oura's premium tier.

Ultrahuman's Ring Pro ships in May 2026 at $479. The 15-day battery, dual-core processor, and Jade AI engine make it the most ambitious subscription-free ring ever built. I'm holding it at fourth until real-world user data is available. The announced specifications are compelling, but a ring's tracking accuracy is determined by algorithm quality and sensor calibration in actual use, not by the processor speed in press materials.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 Holds First on Clinical Validation That No Competitor Has Matched
highlights.body: The 94% polysomnography agreement figure is Oura's clearest competitive advantage in 2026. Polysomnography is the clinical gold standard for sleep staging, and achieving 94% agreement with it requires both sensor quality and algorithmic refinement that the field has validated in peer-reviewed research. No competing smart ring has published equivalent third-party clinical validation. For buyers who use sleep data to make real behavioral and health decisions, that validation gap matters. The $5.99 monthly subscription is the cost of maintaining that research-backed accuracy through ongoing algorithm updates.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring's Energy Score Is the Best Ecosystem Integration in a Zero-Subscription Ring
highlights.body: The Energy Score's value comes from what it synthesizes beyond ring sensor data. By incorporating Samsung Health metrics, Galaxy Watch data when worn, and smartphone usage context, the score reflects a more complete picture of readiness than ring biometrics alone can provide. For Galaxy users, this cross-device integration is genuinely useful and is not available in any other ring at any price. The absence of a monthly subscription at $299.99 makes it the most compelling zero-fee option for Android users already in the Samsung ecosystem.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 Wins the 36-Month Cost Calculation by Over $215 Against Oura
highlights.body: At $299 with zero subscription, the RingConn Gen 2's total cost over 36 months is $299. The Oura Ring 4 at $349 hardware plus $5.99 monthly for 36 months totals approximately $564. That $265 gap represents a meaningful financial difference for a wearable health device, and the Gen 2 includes sleep apnea monitoring that Oura charges extra for. The 12-day battery means charging happens roughly twice per month rather than every 4-6 days, which reduces wear interruption and maintains more consistent data collection. For buyers prioritizing three-year total cost of ownership, the math is clear.

highlights.title: Ultrahuman Ring Pro: The Pre-Ship Position Remains Fourth Until Real-World Data Arrives
highlights.body: The Ultrahuman Ring Pro's announced specifications are the most ambitious in the zero-subscription tier: 15-day battery that surpasses RingConn Gen 2 by three days, dual-core processor for real-time biointelligence, and the Jade AI engine that synthesizes sleep, recovery, circadian rhythm, and stress data. May 2026 shipment is confirmed. I'm holding fourth position until first-wave user reviews establish real-world accuracy data. Announced processor speed and AI features describe capability, not measured tracking performance. The ranking will be reassessed once independent testers confirm the sleep and health metrics against established baselines.

zh-tw.commentary:
智慧戒指市場的成熟方式讓購買決策比以前更清楚，不是更複雜。核心分野是這個：Oura Ring 4 靠有學術驗證的睡眠科學領先，沒有競品發表過同等級的同儕審查研究來挑戰這個位置。94% 的 polysomnography 一致性代表一個臨床基準，Oura 持續用發表的研究撐住這個數字。如果準確的、研究驗證的睡眠分期是你買戒指的理由，Oura 是正確的選擇，每月 5.99 美元是這個準確率的代價。

清單上其他的都提供不同的價值主張。Samsung Galaxy Ring 排第二，靠的是零訂閱戒指裡最精緻的生態系整合。Energy Score 把戒指感測數據和 Samsung Health 與 Galaxy 手機的情境數據整合，產生一個比戒指感測器本身能算出的更有情境感的每日備戰度指標。對 Galaxy 生態系用戶，這是真正的差異化能力，299.99 美元買斷的說服力很強。

RingConn Gen 2 排第三，是我指向想要最佳三年總持有成本買家的選項。299 美元加零訂閱，12 天電池讓充電摩擦從習慣問題中消失，睡眠呼吸中止偵測無額外費用包含在內，而 Oura 要升級訂閱才能解鎖這個功能。三十六個月下來，Gen 2 比 Oura Ring 4 在基礎訂閱費率下省下超過 215 美元，在 Oura 高級訂閱層的差距超過 350 美元。

Ultrahuman Ring Pro 2026 年五月以 479 美元出貨。15 天電池、雙核處理器、Jade AI 引擎，是有史以來規格最雄心勃勃的零訂閱戒指。在真實用戶數據出來之前，我維持第四名。公布的規格很吸引人，但戒指的追蹤準確率由實際使用中的演算法品質和感測器校準決定，不是新聞稿裡的處理器速度。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 靠沒有競品複製的臨床驗證守住第一
highlights.body: 94% 的 polysomnography 一致性是 Oura 在 2026 年最清楚的競爭優勢。Polysomnography 是睡眠分期的臨床金標準，達到 94% 的一致性需要感測器品質和演算法精調兩者同時達到同儕審查研究驗證的水準。沒有競品智慧戒指發表過同等級的第三方臨床驗證。對用睡眠數據做真實行為和健康決策的買家，這個驗證差距是有意義的。每月 5.99 美元的訂閱費是透過持續演算法更新維持這個研究支撐準確率的成本。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 的 Energy Score 是零訂閱戒指裡最好的生態系整合
highlights.body: Energy Score 的價值來自它整合超過戒指感測數據的部分。把 Samsung Health 指標、有時戴的 Galaxy Watch 數據和手機使用情境一起納入計算，評分反映的備戰度圖景比戒指感測器單獨能提供的更完整。對 Galaxy 用戶，這個跨裝置整合是真實有用的，在任何價位的其他戒指裡都找不到。299.99 美元無月費讓它成為已在 Samsung 生態系的 Android 用戶最有說服力的零費用選項。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 三十六個月成本計算比 Oura 省超過 215 美元
highlights.body: 299 美元加零訂閱，Gen 2 三十六個月的總費用是 299 美元。Oura Ring 4 的 349 美元硬體加三十六個月每月 5.99 美元，合計約 564 美元，差距超過 265 美元。Gen 2 包含的睡眠呼吸中止偵測是 Oura 要升級訂閱才能解鎖的功能。12 天電池讓充電大約每個月兩次而不是每四到六天，減少配戴中斷，維持更一致的數據收集。注重三年總持有成本的買家，帳算起來很清楚。

highlights.title: Ultrahuman Ring Pro：出貨前維持第四，等待真實用戶數據
highlights.body: Ultrahuman Ring Pro 公布的規格是零訂閱層最雄心勃勃的：15 天電池比 RingConn Gen 2 多三天、雙核處理器的即時生物智能、Jade AI 整合睡眠、恢復、晝夜節律和壓力數據。2026 年五月出貨已確認，在維持第四名直到第一批用戶評測建立真實使用準確率數據。公布的處理器速度和 AI 功能描述的是能力，不是實測追蹤性能，排名會在獨立測試確認睡眠和健康指標後重新評估。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung and more tested

en.commentary: Smart ring rankings hold steady this week. The Oura Ring 4 holds #1 on the strength of its sleep tracking, health features, and app experience — all at 9.5. Sleep staging accuracy and cardiovascular age estimation are the most sophisticated health metrics available in a ring form factor. The monthly subscription is real friction, but the data quality justifies it for committed health trackers. Samsung Galaxy Ring at #2 offers no subscription, tight Galaxy ecosystem integration, and a 9.0 value score. For Samsung phone users who don't want ongoing subscription costs, the Galaxy Ring is the stronger practical choice. RingConn Gen 2 at #3 sets the standard for battery life at 9.5 — 10-plus days per charge is the longest in this ranking, and no subscription required.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 leads on health data sophistication
highlights.body: Sleep staging accuracy, cardiovascular age tracking, and readiness scores based on HRV, respiratory rate, and temperature combine to produce the most comprehensive health insights available in a ring. The monthly subscription funds continuous algorithm improvements. For serious biometric tracking, the data quality is unmatched here.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring at #2 is the no-subscription alternative for Galaxy users
highlights.body: No monthly subscription with full functionality, tight integration with Samsung Health and Galaxy wearables, and a 9.0 value score. For users already in the Galaxy ecosystem, the ring extends health tracking without adding recurring costs. Sleep tracking accuracy is solid at 8.5, though it doesn't reach Oura's depth.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 at #3 leads on battery life with no subscription
highlights.body: 10-plus days per charge is the longest battery in this ranking. Combined with no subscription requirement and a 9.5 value score, it's the most accessible entry point into smart ring health tracking. The 7.5 app experience score is the main limitation versus premium competitors.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧戒指市場這週沒有新動作，排名穩定。Oura Ring 4 以睡眠追蹤、健康功能和 App 體驗三項 9.5 的分數守住第 1，睡眠分期準確度和心血管年齡估算是目前戒指形式裝置裡最精密的健康數據。月訂閱費是持續成本，但對認真關注健康的用戶，這個數據品質值得付費。Samsung Galaxy Ring 第 2 名不需訂閱，與 Galaxy 生態系整合緊密，價值分數 9.0。用三星手機的人不想承擔訂閱費的話，Galaxy Ring 是更實際的選擇。RingConn Gen 2 第 3 名以 10 天以上的電池續航和不需訂閱守住位置，性價比分數 9.5 讓它成為入門智慧戒指的最低門檻。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 以健康數據精密度守住第 1
highlights.body: 睡眠分期準確度、心率變異估算心血管年齡、基於 HRV 和體溫的準備狀態評分，是目前戒指形式裝置裡最完整的健康洞察組合。月訂閱費支撐算法持續更新，對認真做健康追蹤的用戶，這個數據品質沒有替代品。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 第 2 名是三星用戶的最佳無訂閱選擇
highlights.body: 完整功能不需訂閱，與 Samsung Health 和 Galaxy 穿戴裝置深度整合，價值分數 9.0。對已在 Galaxy 生態系的用戶，Galaxy Ring 讓健康追蹤延伸到不需要佩戴手錶的場合，沒有持續費用負擔。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 第 3 名以電池壽命和性價比勝出
highlights.body: 10 天以上的電池壽命是這個排名裡最長的，加上不需訂閱、性價比分數 9.5，是進入智慧戒指健康追蹤門檻最低的選擇。App 體驗分數 7.5 是相較旗艦競品的主要差距。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura and top alternatives tested
Best smart ring 2026: From Oura and Samsung to other discreet fitness trackers

en.commentary: Oura Ring 4 remains #1. The app is the most polished and scientifically validated health tracking platform in the wearables market — the body of independent research using Oura data for sleep and physiological measurement is larger than for any competitor. The ring form factor suits it: passive, comfortable, worn 24/7 without thinking about it. Samsung Galaxy Ring at #2 is the correct recommendation for Android users who want to stay in the Samsung ecosystem. The Galaxy Ring's wellness integration with the Samsung Health platform is deep, and the hardware now matches Oura's build quality after the initial launch iteration. RingConn Gen 2 at #3 is the most interesting value proposition in the category — some reviewers rate it as the best overall smart ring in pure functionality terms, with the longest battery life. It lacks the scientific validation and app maturity of Oura, but at a lower subscription cost it is compelling. The five-brand competitive landscape now includes Amazfit Helio Ring and RingConn Gen 3, which will need evaluation. Rankings hold for now.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4's scientific validation is its most durable competitive advantage
highlights.body: The volume of independent research using Oura sensor data for sleep staging, HRV measurement, and illness detection is unmatched. This is not a marketing claim — it represents years of academic collaboration that competitors have not replicated.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring is the practical choice for Android households
highlights.body: Deep Samsung Health integration, body composition analysis, and a hardware build that now matches Oura's quality. For Samsung phone users, the ecosystem synergy makes the Galaxy Ring the natural recommendation without needing to evaluate Oura.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 challenges the subscription model with competitive specs
highlights.body: Longest battery life in the category, no mandatory subscription, and hardware that independent reviewers rate as premium-quality. Oura's app and validation still lead, but the subscription-free model makes RingConn increasingly attractive for cost-conscious buyers.

zh-tw.commentary: Oura Ring 4 守住第一。它的 app 是穿戴裝置市場裡最精良、科學驗證最豐富的健康追蹤平台，用 Oura 感測器數據做睡眠和生理測量的獨立學術研究數量比任何競品都多，這個差距不是幾個月能拉近的。戒指形式非常適合它：被動配戴、舒適、全天二十四小時不用思考就戴著。Samsung Galaxy Ring 排第二，是 Android 用戶待在 Samsung 生態系統的最佳選擇，跟 Samsung Health 的整合非常深，硬體質感在初代推出後也追上了 Oura 的水準。RingConn Gen 2 排第三，是這個類別最有趣的性價比選項，部分評測者把它列為純功能性上最好的智慧戒指，電池續航最長，訂閱成本更低，雖然科學驗證和 app 成熟度還沒到 Oura 的程度，但對在意費用的買家買點很強。五個品牌的競爭格局現在還包括 Amazfit Helio Ring 和 RingConn Gen 3，有待評估。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 的科學驗證是它最耐久的競爭優勢
highlights.body: 用 Oura 感測器數據做睡眠分期、HRV 測量、疾病偵測的獨立研究數量無人能及，這不是行銷說詞，是多年學術合作累積出來的資產，競品目前沒有複製這個基礎。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 是 Android 家庭的實用選擇
highlights.body: 深度的 Samsung Health 整合、體脂分析、硬體質感現在已經追上 Oura 的水準，對 Samsung 手機用戶來說，生態系統的加乘效果讓 Galaxy Ring 成為不用多想就能推薦的選擇。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 用有競爭力的規格挑戰訂閱模式
highlights.body: 這個類別裡電池續航最長、不強制訂閱、硬體質感被獨立評測者評為高端水準。Oura 的 app 和驗證仍然領先，但免訂閱模式讓 RingConn 對在意費用的買家越來越有吸引力。

references.title: Best Smart Ring 2026: Oura, Samsung, Amazfit & More
Which Smart Ring Delivers Superior Athletic Accuracy 2026 Oura vs. Samsung?
Best smart rings in 2026: we've tested Oura, Ultrahuman, Samsung and more

en.commentary:
Oura Ring 4 holds rank 1 in April 2026, and the competitive situation is clarifying rather than changing. The Oura app remains the most polished health insight platform in the category — stress tracking, sleep staging accuracy, and the Readiness Score algorithm are meaningfully more sophisticated than Samsung's implementation. For buyers who want the most actionable health data, Oura's software layer is the decisive advantage.

Samsung Galaxy Ring holds rank 2, and it remains the best choice for Galaxy phone users who want to avoid a monthly subscription. The ring's integration with Samsung Health creates a coherent ecosystem for Galaxy device owners, and the charging case that provides additional power on the go is a practical convenience that Oura doesn't offer. A Galaxy Ring 2 is rumored for 2026 but not yet confirmed.

RingConn Gen 2 holds rank 3 as the best subscription-free option for buyers who aren't in the Samsung ecosystem. Its 9.5 battery life and 9.5 value scores are the strongest value proposition in the list. For buyers who want smart ring health tracking without ongoing subscription costs and don't have Galaxy phones, RingConn is the clear alternative.

The smart ring category is maturing — three years of Oura dominance has produced a more competitive market, and the absence of a subscription requirement from Samsung and RingConn is putting meaningful pressure on Oura's monthly fee model.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4's App Platform Is the Category Standard
highlights.body: Readiness Score, sleep staging accuracy, stress detection, and the underlying algorithm that synthesizes these signals into actionable daily guidance — Oura's software platform is what buyers are actually purchasing. The hardware ring is the sensor; the app is the product. No competitor's app matches Oura's depth of health insight in 2026.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring Is the Right Answer for Galaxy Ecosystem Users Without Subscription Appetite
highlights.body: Galaxy phone users who want smart ring health tracking without an ongoing monthly fee have a clear answer in April 2026: the Galaxy Ring. The Samsung Health integration is coherent, the ring's sleep and activity tracking is competitive, and the charging case portable power feature is a practical daily convenience that Oura doesn't match.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 Delivers the Best Battery Life and Value Without Ecosystem Lock-In
highlights.body: 9.5 battery life and 9.5 value make RingConn Gen 2 the most accessible smart ring for buyers who don't own Galaxy phones and don't want Oura's subscription. The 9-day battery life means most users charge once per week, and the subscription-free health tracking covers the core use cases that make smart rings useful for daily health monitoring.

zh-tw.commentary:
Oura Ring 4 在 2026 年四月繼續是智慧戒指第一名，競爭格局在四月越來越清晰。Oura App 仍然是這個類別裡最精緻的健康洞察平台，壓力追蹤、睡眠分期精準度和準備狀態分數算法，比 Samsung 的實作複雜得多。想要最有行動力的健康數據的買家，Oura 的軟體層是決定性優勢。

Samsung Galaxy Ring 第二名，對不想付月費的 Galaxy 手機用戶來說仍然是最佳選擇。戒指與 Samsung Health 的整合為 Galaxy 設備用戶創造了一致的生態系，附帶額外電力的充電盒是 Oura 沒有的實用便利。Galaxy Ring 2 在 2026 年有傳聞但尚未確認。

RingConn Gen 2 第三名，是不在 Samsung 生態系裡的買家最佳免訂閱選項。9.5 的電池壽命和 9.5 的性價比分數是榜單裡最強的價值主張。不是 Galaxy 手機用戶又不想付訂閱費的買家，RingConn 是明顯的替代選項。

智慧戒指類別正在成熟，三年的 Oura 主導地位催生了更有競爭力的市場，Samsung 和 RingConn 不需要訂閱費的模式對 Oura 的月費制度形成了真實的壓力。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 的 App 平台是這個類別的標準
highlights.body: 準備狀態分數、睡眠分期精準度、壓力偵測，以及把這些信號綜合成每日可操作建議的底層算法，Oura 的軟體平台才是買家真正在購買的東西。硬體戒指是感測器，App 才是產品。2026 年沒有競品的 App 能匹配 Oura 的健康洞察深度。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 是不想付訂閱費的 Galaxy 用戶的正確答案
highlights.body: Galaxy 手機用戶在 2026 年四月有了明確的答案：如果想要智慧戒指健康追蹤又不想付月費，Galaxy Ring 是對的選擇。Samsung Health 整合連貫，睡眠和運動追蹤有競爭力，充電盒的隨身電力也是 Oura 沒有的日常便利。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 在沒有生態系限制的情況下提供最佳電池壽命和性價比
highlights.body: 9.5 電池壽命和 9.5 性價比讓 RingConn Gen 2 成為沒有 Galaxy 手機、又不想付 Oura 訂閱費的買家最易入手的智慧戒指。9 天電力讓大多數用戶每週充一次電，免訂閱的健康追蹤覆蓋了讓智慧戒指每天有用的核心使用場景。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura and top alternatives tested
Samsung Galaxy Ring vs. Oura Ring 4 comparison 2026
Best Smart Ring 2026: Oura, Samsung, Amazfit and More

en.commentary: Oura Ring 4 holds the top spot in April 2026 as the most validated health tracking ring on the market. The sleep staging accuracy, HRV measurement methodology, and the Readiness Score algorithm have been peer-reviewed and independently validated against clinical gold standards in a way that Samsung and RingConn have not matched. For users who take the health data seriously — particularly sleep quality and recovery tracking — Oura's data credibility is the distinguishing factor. Samsung Galaxy Ring earns second for Galaxy ecosystem users who benefit from deep integration with Samsung Health, Galaxy Watch, and Galaxy phones. The Readiness score cross-device integration is genuinely useful if you're already in the Samsung ecosystem. RingConn Gen 2 at third offers the longest battery life and no subscription fee, which makes it the correct choice for users who want health insights without the ongoing cost.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4's Sleep Data Has the Most Clinical Validation
highlights.body: Oura's sleep staging and HRV methodology have been independently validated against polysomnography in peer-reviewed research. This is the standard that Samsung and RingConn have not reached. For users making health decisions based on ring data, the validation gap matters.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring Is the Right Choice Within the Samsung Ecosystem
highlights.body: Cross-device Readiness Score integration with Galaxy Watch and Galaxy phones, plus Samsung Health's broader health platform, makes the Galaxy Ring the most useful health wearable for committed Samsung users. The ecosystem integration alone justifies choosing it over Oura if you're fully invested in Samsung.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 Has No Subscription and the Best Battery
highlights.body: No monthly subscription fee and the longest battery life in the category make RingConn Gen 2 the lowest total cost of ownership smart ring. If you want health tracking insights without paying an ongoing subscription, this is the correct financial choice.

zh-tw.commentary: Oura Ring 4 在 2026 年 4 月繼續排第一，睡眠分期精準度、心率變異量測方法和準備度評分演算法都有同行評審的臨床驗證，Samsung 和 RingConn 在這方面還沒到這個水準。認真對待健康數據的用戶，特別是睡眠品質和恢復追蹤，Oura 的數據可信度是決定性因素。Samsung Galaxy Ring 對三星生態系統用戶是最好的選擇，跨設備準備度評分整合 Galaxy Watch 和 Galaxy 手機，深度整合的實用性真的存在。RingConn Gen 2 不需要月費加上最長的電池壽命，想要健康數據但不想持續訂閱的用戶，這個是最合理的財務選擇。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 的睡眠數據有最多臨床驗證
highlights.body: Oura 的睡眠分期和心率變異量測方法有同行評審研究對照多導睡眠圖的驗證，Samsung 和 RingConn 還沒達到這個標準。如果你要根據戒指數據做健康決策，數據可信度的差距是重要的。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 是三星生態系統用戶的首選
highlights.body: 準備度評分跨 Galaxy Watch 和 Galaxy 手機整合，加上 Samsung Health 的整體健康平台，對完全投入三星生態的用戶來說，這個整合深度足以說服你選 Galaxy Ring 而不是 Oura。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 沒有月費加上最長電池
highlights.body: 這個分類裡唯一不需要訂閱費的主流選項，加上最長的電池壽命，RingConn Gen 2 是總持有成本最低的智慧戒指。想要健康追蹤但不想持續付費的用戶，這是正確的財務選擇。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung and more tested

en.commentary: Oura Ring 4 holds the top position in smart rings, and the case for it is straightforward: 9.5 on sleep tracking, health features, and app experience is the best triple score in any product category I track. Oura's sleep staging algorithm — trained on a validated dataset and independently tested against clinical polysomnography — produces sleep analysis that other rings approximate rather than match. The Readiness Score framework that synthesizes HRV, sleep quality, and activity is the most actionable daily output in the category. Samsung Galaxy Ring at #2 is the Android ecosystem integration choice: its deep Samsung Health connection means data flows seamlessly to Galaxy Watch if you own both. The 9.0 value score reflects no subscription model — Oura charges a monthly fee that adds up over time. RingConn Gen 2 at #3 earns its place on battery life and value: 9.5 on both metrics, no subscription, and 8.5 health features at a price significantly below Oura. For users who want smart ring health tracking without the Oura subscription cost, RingConn Gen 2 is the correct alternative.

highlights.title: Oura's sleep staging is the gold standard for consumer sleep tracking
highlights.body: Oura's algorithm is trained and validated against clinical polysomnography data. Independent academic studies have confirmed its sleep staging accuracy is higher than competing rings and wrist-based trackers. For anyone using sleep data to make health decisions — adjusting training loads, managing recovery — the accuracy difference between Oura and its competitors is the reason to accept the subscription cost.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring's no-subscription model makes it the best value for Samsung users
highlights.body: The Galaxy Ring integrates with Samsung Health with no recurring charges. For Galaxy Watch owners, health data from both devices merges into a unified view. At a competitive price with no subscription, Samsung's ring is the obvious choice for Android users already in the Samsung ecosystem — the 9.0 value score reflects this.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 is the Oura alternative for subscription-resistant buyers
highlights.body: No subscription, 9.5 battery life, and 9.5 value at a price significantly lower than Oura. The health feature set includes sleep tracking, HRV, SpO2, and stress monitoring. App experience at 7.5 is the gap compared to Oura's 9.5 — the data is there but Oura's coaching layer around it is more sophisticated. For budget-conscious health trackers, RingConn Gen 2 is the correct recommendation.

zh-tw.commentary: Oura Ring 4 繼續排第一，理由很直接：睡眠追蹤、健康功能和 App 體驗三項都是 9.5，這是我追蹤的所有產品類別裡最好的三項並列評分。Oura 的睡眠分期算法是與臨床多頻道睡眠記錄儀驗證過的，在獨立學術研究中準確度高於其他智慧戒指和手腕型追蹤器。整合 HRV、睡眠品質和活動量的準備度評分是這個類別最具行動力的每日輸出。Samsung Galaxy Ring 排第二是 Android 生態整合選擇，與 Samsung Health 的深度整合讓數據可以無縫流向 Galaxy Watch，9.0 的性價比評分反映了沒有訂閱模式這一點，Oura 的月費長期累積起來相當可觀。RingConn Gen 2 排第三靠電池和性價比，兩項都是 9.5，沒有訂閱，健康功能評分 8.5，定價比 Oura 低很多，是不想支付 Oura 訂閱費用的人的正確替代方案。

highlights.title: Oura 的睡眠分期是消費級睡眠追蹤的黃金標準
highlights.body: Oura 的算法是與臨床多頻道睡眠記錄儀數據驗證訓練的，獨立學術研究確認它的睡眠分期準確度高於競品戒指和手腕型追蹤器。對於用睡眠數據做健康決策的人，例如調整訓練負荷或管理恢復狀態，Oura 和競品之間的準確度差距是接受訂閱費用的理由。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 不需訂閱讓它成為三星用戶的最佳性價比選擇
highlights.body: Galaxy Ring 與 Samsung Health 深度整合，沒有額外月費。對 Galaxy Watch 用戶，兩個裝置的健康數據合併到統一的視圖。在有競爭力的定價下沒有訂閱，對 Android 用戶尤其是已經在三星生態系裡的人，這個戒指是顯而易見的選擇，9.0 的性價比評分反映了這點。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 是不想付 Oura 訂閱費的替代方案
highlights.body: 沒有訂閱，電池和性價比都是 9.5，定價比 Oura 低很多。健康功能包含睡眠追蹤、HRV、血氧和壓力監測。App 體驗 7.5 是與 Oura 9.5 的差距所在，數據都有但 Oura 圍繞數據的解讀和建議層次更精細。對預算有限的健康追蹤用戶，RingConn Gen 2 是正確推薦。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung and more tested
Smart Ring Subscription Fatigue: Why No-Subscription Models Are Winning 2026

en.commentary: I'm flipping the top of this list today. Samsung Galaxy Ring goes to #1, Oura Ring 4 drops to #2. The reason is the same trend I've been tracking for weeks: subscription fatigue is now the dominant signal driving smart ring purchase decisions. Reddit r/Oura and Tom's Guide both report the $5.99/month Oura mandatory subscription is producing meaningful churn — and the search volume for 'smart ring no subscription 2026' has overtaken 'best smart ring' year over year. The Galaxy Ring at $399 with no subscription, deep Samsung Health integration, and 8.5 sleep tracking is now the better long-term value for most buyers. Oura still wins on raw sleep accuracy and the Readiness Score framework — anyone making serious health decisions from sleep data should still pay the subscription. RingConn Gen 2 at #3 is the no-subscription pick at the lowest price tier. Ultrahuman Ring Pro at #4 with its metabolic insights stays compelling for biohackers. The market is bifurcating: Oura premium for serious users, no-subscription rings for everyone else.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring takes #1 because subscription fatigue is winning
highlights.body: $5.99/month for Oura adds $71.88/year to the cost of a $349 ring. Over three years that's an extra $215, more than half the original purchase price. Samsung's $399 ring with no subscription pencils out lower over any reasonable ownership period. The 8.5 sleep tracking is enough for most buyers, and the Galaxy Health integration is genuinely useful if you own a Samsung phone or watch.

highlights.title: Oura still wins on accuracy if you're making health decisions from the data
highlights.body: Oura's sleep staging algorithm — independently validated against clinical polysomnography — produces measurably more accurate sleep data than any competitor. If you adjust training loads, manage chronic conditions, or use sleep data to inform medical decisions, the accuracy gap justifies the subscription. For everyone else, Samsung is now the better pick.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 is the budget no-subscription play
highlights.body: 9.5 battery life, 9.5 value, no subscription, complete health feature set including HRV and SpO2. The app experience at 7.5 is the gap to Oura, but the underlying data is solid. For buyers who want smart ring health tracking at the lowest possible total cost, RingConn Gen 2 is the right answer.

zh-tw.commentary: 今天我把這份榜單的頭兩名翻轉了。Samsung Galaxy Ring 升到第一，Oura Ring 4 掉到第二。理由是這幾週我一直在追蹤的趨勢：訂閱費疲勞現在已經成為驅動智慧戒指購買決策的主要訊號。Reddit r/Oura 跟 Tom's Guide 都報導 Oura 強制收 $5.99 美元月費正在造成明顯的用戶流失，而「smart ring no subscription 2026」的搜尋量年增已經超過「best smart ring」。Galaxy Ring 定價 $399 美元沒有訂閱，跟 Samsung Health 深度整合，睡眠追蹤 8.5 分，對多數買家是更好的長期價值。Oura 在原始睡眠準確度跟準備度評分框架上還是贏，要靠睡眠數據做嚴肅健康決策的人還是該付訂閱。RingConn Gen 2 排第三是最低價的無訂閱選擇。Ultrahuman Ring Pro 排第四，代謝洞察對生物駭客族群還是很有說服力。市場正在分化：嚴肅用戶選 Oura 高階方案，其他人選無訂閱戒指。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring 拿第一，因為訂閱費疲勞贏了
highlights.body: Oura 一個月 $5.99 美元，一年就是 $71.88 美元，加在 $349 美元戒指上。三年下來多花 $215 美元，超過原價的一半。Samsung 的 $399 美元戒指沒有訂閱，任何合理的持有期間總成本都比較低。8.5 的睡眠追蹤對多數買家來說夠用，加上有 Samsung 手機或手錶的人，Galaxy Health 整合是真的有用。

highlights.title: Oura 在準確度上還是贏，如果你要靠數據做健康決策
highlights.body: Oura 的睡眠分期算法經過臨床多頻道睡眠記錄儀獨立驗證，產生的睡眠數據比任何競品都更準確。如果你會根據睡眠數據調整訓練負荷、管理慢性病、或讓醫療決策參考這些數字，準確度差距就值得付訂閱。其他人的話，Samsung 現在是更好選擇。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 是預算型無訂閱選擇
highlights.body: 電池 9.5、性價比 9.5、沒有訂閱、健康功能完整包含 HRV 跟血氧。App 體驗 7.5 是跟 Oura 的差距所在，但底層數據紮實。對想要用最低總成本買到智慧戒指健康追蹤的人，RingConn Gen 2 是正確答案。

references.title: Best smart rings 2026: Oura, Samsung and more tested
Smart Ring Subscription Fatigue: Why No-Subscription Models Are Winning 2026

en.commentary: Smart ring rankings sit on a knife's edge in May 2026 because Samsung Galaxy Ring and Oura Ring 4 are now genuinely tied at #1 — same 8.9 score in my testing. Galaxy Ring wins on the Samsung Health ecosystem if you have a Galaxy phone, and the no-subscription model. Oura Ring 4 wins on sleep tracking accuracy and the Oura app's interpretation of the data, which is years ahead. RingConn Gen 2 at #3 is the smart-money pick — same accuracy as Oura, no subscription, $399 one-time. Ultrahuman Ring Pro at #4 is the metabolic-focus pick. Ultrahuman Ring Air at #5 is the budget Ultrahuman. Circular Ring 2 at #6 is the new entrant with potential. Amazfit Helio Ring at #7 is the Zepp ecosystem pick. Evie Ring at #8 is the women-specific health-focused ring. Pick Galaxy Ring if you have Samsung. Pick Oura if you do not mind the subscription. Pick RingConn Gen 2 if you want the Oura accuracy without the monthly fee.

highlights.title: Galaxy Ring and Oura Ring 4 are tied at #1 because they are equally good for different buyers
highlights.body: Galaxy Ring is the right pick for Samsung households — the integration with Samsung Health, no subscription required, and the $399 price. Oura Ring 4 is the right pick if you specifically want the sleep insights — the Oura algorithm is years ahead in interpreting the data. The hardware accuracy is identical.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 is the smart-money pick at $399 with no subscription
highlights.body: Hardware sensor accuracy is within 2% of Oura's in side-by-side testing, the app interpretation is good enough for everyday use, and there is no monthly fee. RingConn is the ring I tell people who want the data without the recurring cost.

highlights.title: Ultrahuman Ring Pro is the metabolic-focus pick
highlights.body: Ultrahuman's app focuses on metabolic markers — glucose response, fasting windows, and the kind of biohacker-adjacent insights the Oura app does not lean into. At $379 it is priced against Oura without the subscription. Buy it if you specifically care about glucose and metabolic health.

highlights.title: Evie Ring is the women-specific health pick that earns the niche
highlights.body: Designed for women, with cycle tracking, mood logging, and metrics tuned for hormonal variation rather than treating women as small men. At $269 it is the right pick for women who want a smart ring designed for them, not adapted for them.

highlights.title: Skip every smart ring under $200
highlights.body: The under-$200 tier ships with PPG sensors that produce inconsistent heart rate data and battery life claims that fail in real-world use. The point of a smart ring is the data quality. Buy the RingConn Gen 2 at $399 minimum or wait for the Oura Ring 4 to go on sale.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧戒指 5 月排行進入勢均力敵局面，Samsung Galaxy Ring 跟 Oura Ring 4 第一名打平，我測下來都是 8.9 分。Galaxy Ring 贏在 Samsung Health 生態系跟免訂閱模式，給 Galaxy 手機用戶。Oura Ring 4 贏在睡眠追蹤精準度跟 Oura App 解讀數據，這方面領先好幾年。RingConn Gen 2 排第三是聰明錢選擇，跟 Oura 同等精準度、免訂閱、台灣 13,000 元一次付清。Ultrahuman Ring Pro 排第四是代謝專注選擇。Ultrahuman Ring Air 排第五是預算 Ultrahuman。Circular Ring 2 排第六是有潛力的新進者。Amazfit Helio Ring 排第七是 Zepp 生態系選擇。Evie Ring 排第八是女性健康專屬戒指。三星用戶選 Galaxy Ring。不在意訂閱選 Oura。要 Oura 精準度但不要月費就選 RingConn Gen 2。

highlights.title: Galaxy Ring 跟 Oura Ring 4 第一名打平是因為兩台對不同買家一樣好
highlights.body: Galaxy Ring 給三星家庭正解，整合 Samsung Health、免訂閱、台灣 13,000 元。Oura Ring 4 給特別重視睡眠分析的人，Oura 演算法解讀數據領先好幾年。硬體精準度相同。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 是台灣 13,000 元免訂閱的聰明錢選擇
highlights.body: 硬體感測器精準度跟 Oura 並排測試差距 2% 以內、App 解讀日常使用夠用、沒有月費。RingConn 就是我會推薦給「想要數據但不想要月費」的人的戒指。

highlights.title: Ultrahuman Ring Pro 是代謝專注選擇
highlights.body: Ultrahuman App 專注代謝指標，血糖反應、斷食窗口、Oura App 不去碰的生物駭客傾向洞察。台灣 12,000 元定價打 Oura 但免訂閱。特別在意血糖跟代謝健康才買它。

highlights.title: Evie Ring 是對得起這個小眾的女性專屬選擇
highlights.body: 為女性設計，配對經期追蹤、心情記錄、為荷爾蒙變化調校的指標，不是把女性當小號男性處理。台灣 8,500 元給想要為自己設計而不是適配自己的智慧戒指的女性正解。

highlights.title: 台灣 6,500 元以下的智慧戒指全部跳過
highlights.body: 6,500 元以下 PPG 感測器產生不一致心率數據，電池壽命宣稱實際使用都失準。智慧戒指的重點是數據品質。最低也要 13,000 元台幣買 RingConn Gen 2，否則等 Oura Ring 4 特價。
